title: PFL World Tournament: Brand Development
tagline: Creating the visual future for the Professional Fighters League.

body: The PFL wanted a graphics system centered around bold, 3D visuals — especially for the fight clock and key broadcast elements — while showcasing the global nature of the tournament. Most importantly, the bracket needed to feel like a central character, driving the narrative from fight to fight.

When we began, the tournament structure and overall narrative were completely different. The graphics we were initially developing, while still on-brand, were tailored to an entirely different product — requiring us to pivot quickly once the new World Tournament format was finalized.

The PFL was launching its new World Tournament broadcast and needed a fresh graphics package that set it apart while staying true to the core identity fans know and love. As Creative Director, I led a one-month concept phase followed by a three-month execution, delivering over 100 custom graphics for broadcast, brand integration, and promotional content.

We created the slogan “ONE SHOT” to capture the high-stakes, win-or-go-home nature of the tournament. The phrase became a unifying theme, woven throughout the brand campaign and embedded across the entire graphics package.
led: Led a one-month concept and three-month execution

impact.note: The client was thrilled, and fans across social media praised the package for its modern, sleek look — over 100 custom assets spanning broadcast, brand campaign, and promotional spots.
